Replacement Banner Overview & Ordering Options

Update your Versatile Banner Stand Heavy Duty 36x90 with a custom replacement banner designed for professional display use. Our replacement banners are built for durability and feature vibrant colors that maintain their quality through repeated use in both indoor and outdoor environments.

Three Ways to Order Custom Replacement Banners

Choose from three convenient ordering methods to create your perfect replacement banner:

  1. Pick a Template to Customize: Select from our professional template library and customize with backgrounds, clipart, text, and uploaded graphics using our online design tool.
  2. Upload Your Print-Ready File: Submit your completed artwork in high-resolution format. Our team will ensure proper sizing and print optimization.
  3. Professional Design Service: Work with our graphic design team to create a completely custom replacement banner based on your specifications and uploaded materials.

All replacement banners are custom-sized to fit your Versatile Banner Stand Heavy Duty 36x90 perfectly, ensuring smooth operation and professional presentation.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Material Options for Versatile Banner Stand Replacements

Standard 13oz Vinyl for Indoor & Outdoor Use

Our high-quality 13oz vinyl serves as the standard material for replacement banners, offering excellent durability for both indoor and outdoor display applications. This material provides reliable performance in varying weather conditions while maintaining vibrant print quality.

Premium Stay-Flat 14oz Vinyl for Professional Display

Upgrade to our 14oz vinyl material for enhanced professional appearance and superior lay-flat performance. This premium option features a smooth matte finish that reduces glare and provides exceptional print clarity for high-visibility applications.

Banner Soft Fabric for Smooth Retraction

Our Banner Soft Fabric offers a premium matte finish with vibrant color reproduction, ideal for high-end displays. The fabric edges are precision cut with hot-knife technology to prevent fraying during repeated rolling and unrolling in your banner stand mechanism.

Each material option is specifically chosen for compatibility with the Versatile Banner Stand Heavy Duty 36x90 retraction system, ensuring long-term reliable operation.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Replacement Banner Finishing Options for Stand Compatibility

All replacement banners include professional finishing designed specifically for the Versatile Banner Stand Heavy Duty 36x90 system:

  • Precision Sizing: Each replacement banner is cut to exact specifications for proper fit and smooth operation
  • Reinforced Mounting Areas: Critical attachment points are reinforced to prevent tearing during installation and retraction
  • Edge Sealing: Vinyl materials receive heat-sealed edges to prevent delamination and ensure longevity
  • Fabric Edge Treatment: Soft fabric banners feature hot-knife cut edges to eliminate fraying

Our finishing process ensures your replacement banner will operate smoothly with your existing stand hardware while providing professional presentation quality.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Replacement Banner Production & Turnaround Times

Choose from flexible production schedules to meet your replacement banner timeline requirements:

  • 5 Day Saver: Most economical option for non-urgent replacement orders
  • 3 Day Standard: Our most popular production timeline offering fast turnaround at no additional cost
  • 2 Day Express: Accelerated production for time-sensitive replacement needs
  • 1 Day Priority: Rush production available for urgent replacement banner orders

Important Production Notes:

  • Production time begins after artwork approval, not at order placement
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day
  • Total delivery time equals production time plus selected shipping method
  • Custom artwork orders may require additional approval time

Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 for questions about production scheduling or rush order availability.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Options for Custom Replacement Banner Orders

We accept multiple payment methods for your convenience:

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover accepted
  • Check Payments: Personal and business checks accepted (must clear before production begins)
  • Purchase Orders: Available for qualified business accounts (contact customer service)

Payment Processing:

  • All replacement banners require payment before production begins
  • Credit cards are charged only after artwork proof approval
  • Minimum order requirement: $35.00 in product value
  • Check orders begin production after payment clearance

For purchase order options or payment questions, contact our customer service representatives at (320) 391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Replacement Banner Delivery

Choose from multiple shipping options to receive your replacement banner:

  • Economy (5-10 Business Days): Most cost-effective shipping option
  • Standard (3-5 Business Days): Reliable delivery to most US locations
  • Three Day (3 Business Days): Guaranteed delivery timing
  • Two Day (2 Business Days): Express delivery for urgent needs
  • Overnight (1 Business Day): Next-day delivery available

Shipping Information:

  • Shipping costs determined by package weight and destination
  • Tracking numbers provided once shipment leaves our facility
  • Large banners may require folding due to carrier size restrictions
  • International shipping available (contact customer service for quotes)

Delivery Notes: We recommend ordering replacement banners early as we cannot control delivery timing once packages leave our production facility. All carrier terms and conditions apply after shipment.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Installation Guide for Versatile Banner Stand Heavy Duty 36x90

Follow these steps to install your replacement banner in your Versatile Banner Stand Heavy Duty 36x90:

Installation Process

  1. Remove Old Banner: Carefully retract existing banner and detach from stand mechanism
  2. Position New Banner: Align replacement banner with stand attachment points
  3. Secure Mounting: Attach banner to both top and bottom mounting mechanisms
  4. Test Operation: Extend and retract banner to ensure smooth operation
  5. Final Adjustment: Make any necessary tension adjustments for optimal display

Display Applications

  • Trade Show Booths: Professional displays for exhibitions and conventions
  • Retail Environments: Point-of-sale displays and promotional signage
  • Office Lobbies: Welcome messages and company branding
  • Event Venues: Temporary signage for meetings and presentations
  • Outdoor Applications: Weather-resistant displays for outdoor events

The Versatile Banner Stand Heavy Duty 36x90 system provides reliable performance for both temporary and long-term display applications.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Replacement Banner Artwork Requirements for Printing

File Specifications

  • Accepted Formats: .EPS, .PDF, high-resolution .TIFF, or .JPG files
  • Resolution Requirements: 300 DPI minimum for optimal print quality
  • File Size Limit: 60 MB maximum for online uploads
  • Color Mode: CMYK preferred for accurate color reproduction

Design Specifications for 36x90 Replacement Banners

  • Finished Size: 36" width x 90" height
  • Bleed Area: Include 0.125" bleed on all edges
  • Safety Zone: Keep important text and graphics 0.5" from edges
  • Orientation: Vertical layout optimized for stand display

Upload Options

  • Online Upload: Files under 60 MB can be uploaded during ordering
  • Large Files: Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 for files over 60 MB
  • Design Assistance: Our design team can help optimize your artwork for printing

Visit our complete artwork specifications page for detailed technical requirements and design guidelines.

Order Your Custom Replacement Banner Today

Ready to update your Versatile Banner Stand Heavy Duty 36x90? Get started with your custom replacement banner using our simple three-step process:

  1. Choose Your Size & Material: Select 36x90 dimensions and pick from our durable material options
  2. Design Your Banner: Use our templates, upload your artwork, or work with our design team
  3. Select Production & Shipping: Choose your timeline and delivery method

Why Choose Banners.com for Replacement Banners?

  • Expert Customer Service: 100% in-house support from professional graphic designers
  • Flexible Production Times: 1, 2, 3, or 5-day production options to meet your schedule
  • Premium Materials: High-quality materials designed for banner stand compatibility
  • Live Order Tracking: Monitor your replacement banner production in real-time
  • Perfect Fit Guarantee: Precision sizing ensures proper operation with your existing stand

Our replacement banners are built to provide reliable performance and professional presentation for your Versatile Banner Stand Heavy Duty 36x90 system.

Questions about replacement banners? Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 or use our online chat for immediate assistance.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Replacement Banners

How long do replacement banners last?

Our replacement banners are designed for extended use. Vinyl banners typically last 2-5 years depending on usage frequency and environmental conditions. Indoor use generally extends banner life, while outdoor applications may require more frequent replacement due to UV exposure and weather conditions.

Can I use outdoor materials for indoor displays?

Yes, our outdoor-rated materials work excellently for indoor applications. Many customers prefer our 13oz or 14oz vinyl materials for indoor use because they provide enhanced durability and professional appearance, even in climate-controlled environments.

What file formats do you accept for custom artwork?

We accept .EPS, .PDF, high-resolution .TIFF, and .JPG files up to 60 MB. For optimal print quality, provide files at 300 DPI resolution in CMYK color mode. Files larger than 60 MB can be submitted by contacting our customer service team.

Will my replacement banner fit perfectly in my existing stand?

Yes, all replacement banners are precision-cut to exact specifications for the Versatile Banner Stand Heavy Duty 36x90. Our finishing process includes reinforced mounting areas and proper edge treatment to ensure smooth operation with your existing hardware.

Can you match colors from my previous banner?

We can work to match colors from reference materials you provide. For best results, supply a physical sample of your previous banner or provide Pantone color specifications. Our design team can help ensure color consistency across replacement orders.

Do you offer design services for replacement banners?

Yes, our professional design team can create custom artwork for your replacement banner. Simply provide your content, images, and design preferences, and we'll create a proof for your approval before production begins.

What happens if my replacement banner is damaged during shipping?

If your replacement banner arrives damaged, contact us immediately. We require return of damaged items and will send a replacement at no additional cost. All shipments include tracking numbers so you can monitor delivery status.

Can I order multiple replacement banners with different designs?

Absolutely! Many customers order multiple replacement banners for rotating messages, seasonal campaigns, or different events. Each banner can feature completely different designs while maintaining the same 36x90 dimensions for your stand.
